ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 浏览

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select to save log file inside or outside the vault. Default is outside the vault, to avoid the log file to be indexed by Obsidian (which will crash if there are too many entries).
ast.target: 选择将日志文件保存在保险库内部还是外部。默认保存在保险库外部，以避免日志文件被 Obsidian 索引（条目过多时会导致崩溃）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to save the log file outside the vault.
ast.target: 保险库外部日志文件的保存位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to save the log file inside the vault.
ast.target: 保险库内部日志文件的保存位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds the YYYY-MM-DD timestamp to the output filename.
ast.target: 在输出文件名中添加 YYYY-MM-DD 时间戳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prints the log events timestamp in UTC instead of local time.
ast.target: 以 UTC 而非本地时间打印日志事件时间戳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only print out the log level equal to or above what you set here.
ast.target: 仅输出等于或高于此处设置级别的日志。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Disabling this setting will cause Logcollector to write everything
	        to the output file as it happens, and as such will impact performance.
	        Usually, you'll want to keep this setting enabled.
ast.target: 禁用此设置将导致 Logcollector 在事件发生时立即将所有内容写入输出文件，从而影响性能。通常，您应保持此设置启用。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 输出格式

ast.name: setName

ast.name: setName

ast.name: setName
